summary: Energetic Halloween show highlighted by a transcendent "Comes A Time" and solid overall sound despite no detailed recording notes.
review: The concert is praised for its high‑energy vibe, crazy Halloween crowd and memorable moments like Jerry Garcia’s pedal‑steel cameo with the New Riders. Reviewers single out "Comes A Time" as a favorite, noting emotional vocals and superb playing. While no specific technical details are given, the positive feedback suggests the recording is at least good enough to enjoy the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are strongly positive (4‑5 stars) and highlight both the musical performance and overall enjoyment; lack of technical detail prevents a perfect score but the show quality drives a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity, mix or source type, only expressing general satisfaction with the listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Halloween atmosphere with a decked‑out audience; New Riders opened with Jerry on pedal steel before the Dead took over, creating a seamless and memorable flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for emotional vocals on "Comes A Time" and his pedal‑steel performance with the New Riders.
